results.name: wade wilson
results.description: It's me, Deadpool, AKA the Merc with a Mouth, your favorite wise-cracking, fourth-wall-breaking mercenary from the world of Marvel Comics! Can you believe they gave me a whole Secret Lair? I like the one where I get to ride the unicorn.

results.name: waterbending
results.description: A bending tradition shared by the Northern and Southern Water Tribes, allowing practitioners to manipulate water and ice. The most feared waterbenders can even bend the blood inside a person's body. For other forms of water magic, see [hydromancy](hydromancy).

results.description: Like a tornado, but mainly water. 🌪
